transforms: Searched remaining logo gaps using English and Arabic institution names.
Collected profile-logo candidates from official Facebook and X pages when page identity was clear.
Preferred official website raster logos where direct source paths were found.
Rejected default social profile placeholders and unclear page matches.
Generated WebP and AVIF variants under the universities CDN key namespace.
Uploaded verified variants to R2 and retained reviewed source URLs in data/assets.json.
reviewNotes: Second logo batch after adding Arabic-name and official-social search. Approved 17 additional logo assets; remaining gaps are limited to records without a clean official logo source in this pass.
